Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 19 

FORMULARY_ID 

LABEL: Formulary Identification Number 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique identification number assigned to each formulary. Part D plans submit their 
formularies to CMS and identify the drug products that are covered using the National Library of 
Medicine’s RxNorm Concept Unique Identifiers (RXCUIs). 

The same formulary may be
